calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-10-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: DEPT. 218 Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
Appearances:
Daniel Bornstein, Esq. for and with Plaintiff Mercy Housing California, represented by their agent Suzanna Jimenez.
Sara Malan, Esq. present with and representing the Defendant, Danielle Rand through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

Case settled, parties enter into a signed agreement and stipulation for entry of future judgment, which was filed.
Trial date of DEC-14-2009 is vacated.
